summary: Comprehensive testing of admin features enhancement completed. All features working correctly: Admin can delete regular users (with OTP), profile completion endpoint returns correct data with all categories, profile completion UI displays correctly with percentage and category breakdown, user detail view shows all non-sensitive information, delete button visible for admins viewing regular users but hidden for super_admin.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile completion endpoint correctly checks 11 items: name, phone, email_verified, company_name, address, siret, vat_number, iban, bic, logo, website
Delete user endpoint correctly requires OTP verification and validates target_user_id matches OTP
Admin can delete regular users but NOT other admins (only super_admin can delete admins)
Super admin account is protected from deletion
Profile completion UI shows percentage, category progress bars (Profil, Entreprise, Légal, Bancaire), and detailed item list with completion status

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 passed, 1 skipped - no admin user to test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin features enhancement testing completed. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile-completion (returns completion status with 11 items in 4 categories), DELETE /api/users/{user_id} (requires OTP, admin can delete users but not other admins). UI verified: Profile completion card shows percentage, category breakdown, and detailed items. Delete button visible for regular users, hidden for super_admin.

admin_delete_users.details: Admin can request OTP and delete regular users. Cannot delete other admins (only super_admin can). Super admin protected from deletion.

profile_completion_endpoint.details: Returns correct structure with user_id, completion_percentage, completed_count, total_count, items array, and summary object with category breakdowns

profile_completion_ui.details: Displays 27% completion for test user, shows 4 category cards (Profil 100%, Entreprise 0%, Légal 0%, Bancaire 0%), detailed items with green/red status indicators

user_detail_view.details: Shows email, phone, company, address, registration date, last login, email verified badge, account status. No sensitive data (password) exposed.

delete_button_visibility.details: Delete button visible for admin viewing regular users, correctly hidden when viewing super_admin
